name: Credit Suisse AG Credit Suisse X-Links Crude Oil Shares Covered Call ETN
summary: Credit Suisse AG Credit Suisse X-Links Crude Oil Shares Covered Call ETN is an exchange-traded note (ETN). It seeks to provide investors with monthly cash distributions from the option premium and exposure to the share price of the United States Oil Fund LP (USO). The ETN uses a covered call strategy on USO shares.
